description: Create a 3D model of a concrete staircase with 10 steps in FreeCAD. Each step must have dimensions of 1000 mm (Width/X), 280 mm (Run/Depth/Y), and 180 mm (Rise/Height/Z), arranged in a continuous straight flight. The final model must be a single fused object or compound. Save the completed model to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/staircase.FCStd.
